scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run start --prefix frontend/d20"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend/d20
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix backend && npm run test --prefix frontend/d20
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend/d20 -- --configuration development
